app.name: Damian App
app.description: Minimal Next.js 16 + React 19 + Tailwind starter built on the Tesslate nextjs-16-base template. Boots a live dev server with Turbopack; ready to hack on immediately after install.

containers.name: web
containers.startup_command: sh -c 'cd /app && (test -x node_modules/.bin/next || pnpm install --frozen-lockfile) && bun run dev -- --hostname 0.0.0.0 --port 3000'
